scripts.check: npm run types:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run deploy:dry-run
scripts.d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --config wrangler.database.jsonc
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.database.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:database && npm run d1:migrate:remote && npm run deploy:router
scripts.deploy:dry-run: wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.database.jsonc && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.router.jsonc
scripts.types: wrangler types types/database-env.d.ts --config wrangler.database.jsonc --env-interface DatabaseEnv --include-runtime false && wrangler types types/router-env.d.ts --config wrangler.router.jsonc --env-interface RouterEnv --include-runtime false && wrangler types types/storage-env.d.ts --config wrangler.storage.jsonc --env-interface StorageEnv --include-runtime false
scripts.types:check: wrangler types types/database-env.d.ts --config wrangler.database.jsonc --env-interface DatabaseEnv --include-runtime false --check && wrangler types types/router-env.d.ts --config wrangler.router.jsonc --env-interface RouterEnv --include-runtime false --check && wrangler types types/storage-env.d.ts --config wrangler.storage.jsonc --env-interface StorageEnv --include-runtime false --check
